The question is asking to find out the distance of each of Hannes Hopley's throws. Unlike the previous examples, we don't need to group data here since we're interested in viewing all individual throw distances rather than aggregating or categorizing them. Therefore, we can directly view the data without using any grouping operation.

The question is asking to determine the distance of each of Hannes Hopley's throws as listed in the data. Since the "notes" column contains numerical values representing the distances, we can simply display the "notes" column for each event to see the respective distances. Sorting may not be necessary if we only want to list the distances associated with each throw.
